customSpeechApi.urlDesc: The API endpoint URL (HTTP URL or WebSocket URL)

dictionary.title: 📖 Dictionary
dictionary.subtitle: Custom vocabulary and automatic word replacements
dictionary.heroDesc: Add custom words (like names, technical terms, abbreviations) to help the transcription model recognize specialized vocabulary. Set up word replacements to automatically correct common misheard words.
dictionary.noWords: No custom words yet. Add words to improve transcription accuracy.
dictionary.noReplacements: No replacement rules. Add rules to automatically replace words in transcriptions.

enhancement.title: AI Enhancement
enhancement.subtitle: Configure AI-powered text enhancement after transcription
enhancement.enableDesc: Enhance transcribed text using AI before pasting

prompts.userPlaceholder: Use {{text}} as placeholder for the transcription

context.screenDesc: Capture screen content as context for smarter enhancements

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: VoiceInk needs access to your microphone to transcribe speech.
permissions.microphoneDesc: Required for recording audio for transcription.

permissions.title: 🛡️ Permissions
permissions.subtitle: VoiceInk needs certain permissions to function properly. Grant the required permissions below.

about.title: ℹ️ About Permissions
about.microphone: Microphone: Essential for recording your voice for transcription.
about.accessibility: Accessibility: Needed to paste transcribed text directly into apps. On macOS, enable in System Preferences → Privacy & Security → Accessibility.
about.screenRecording: Screen Recording: Optional — allows VoiceInk to capture screen context for smarter AI enhancements.
about.keyboardShortcut: Keyboard Shortcut: Configure global hotkeys to start/stop recording from any application.

items.microphoneDesc: Required for voice recording and speech-to-text transcription
items.accessibilityDesc: Required for pasting transcribed text into the active application
items.screenRecordingDesc: Optional — enables screen context awareness for AI enhancement
items.keyboardShortcutDesc: Configure global hotkeys to trigger recording from anywhere

powerMode.title: Power Mode
powerMode.subtitle: Configure intelligent automation for different application contexts
powerMode.empty: No power modes yet. Add a mode to enable context-aware automation.
powerMode.name: Name
